arts.ttl: Seko Fofana misses out on chance to face former club Lens, Ludovic Blas out for Rennes
arts.sum: Seko Fofana will miss out on the chance to face his former club, RC Lens, due to suspension. He is one of two major absentees for Stade Rennais. Rennes are…

RC Lens host Stade Rennais at the Stade Bollaert-Delelis on Saturday. After a challenging start to the season, Lens seem to have regained some form with a 1-0 victory over Marseille in their last mat...
